summary: A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000002) was filed for Sally Dominguez, a customer of ADBL, due to a transaction that triggered an internal threshold alert. On 2022-10-07, Dominguez conducted a cash withdrawal transfer of NPR 21,807.13 to Henry King, with account numbers NP00000000000983174071 and NP00000000000894070684 involved. The transaction was routed through HBL and involved countries GB and IN. The amount and velocity of the transaction were deemed inconsistent with Dominguez's declared income profile. No adverse media or sanctions matches were found, but the pattern of transfers, which were executed in rapid succession and below reporting thresholds, raised suspicions. The report was submitted for further analysis, involving ADBL and HBL, and does not imply wrongdoing.
narrative: During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at ADBL examined the account held by Sally Dominguez after an internal threshold alert was triggered. Between 2022-10-07 and 2022-10-07, the customer conducted 1 transaction(s) — predominantly cash withdrawals — amounting to approximately NPR 21,807. Of these, 1 were cross-border, routed to counterparties outside the customer's usual corridor. The principal counterparties observed were Henry King. For context, the customer's KYC file lists a modest declared income profile; in the reviewing officer's judgement the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile. It is worth noting that no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified at the time of filing, and the customer has been with the institution for some years, which the desk weighed before escalating. Nonetheless, a number of the transfers appear to have been deliberately kept below reporting thresholds and were executed in rapid succession, a pattern the officer considers consistent with Cash Withdrawal. This report is submitted out of an abundance of caution for the compliance unit's further analysis and does not, by itself, constitute a determination of wrongdoing.
